name: Destiny 2

"Destiny 2" Lawless Reclamation Heresy launch dates official

seasons.description: The current Year 8 season launched alongside Renegades and covers the next six months of content with the Lawless Frontier mode, new characters, a new social hub, and ongoing major updates.
The first Year 8 season began with The Edge of Fate and the Year of Prophecy, starting Destiny 2's new long-form seasonal structure with major updates like Ash & Iron.
The final Year 7 episode launched before Year 8 and added new story content aboard the Dreadnaught, the Nether activity, the Sundered Doctrine dungeon, and wide sandbox updates.
